datasets.name: 99c94c0b
queryLines:
-- LINE CHART: Monthly Booking Volume & Average Fare
SELECT
    DATE_TRUNC('month',
      TO_TIMESTAMP(BookingDateTime, 'd/M/yyyy H:mm')
    )                             AS booking_month,
    COUNT(*)                      AS total_bookings,
    ROUND(AVG(Fare), 2)           AS avg_fare,
    ROUND(AVG(Distance), 2)       AS avg_distance
FROM booking
GROUP BY booking_month
ORDER BY booking_month;

-- Dashboard config:
--   Chart type  : Line
--   X-axis      : booking_month
--   Y-axis      : total_bookings  (left axis)
--   Y-axis 2    : avg_fare        (right axis, optional)

datasets.name: 54c3ed29
queryLines:
-- BAR CHART: Revenue Metrics by Taxi Type
SELECT
    tt.TypeName                    AS taxi_type,
    COUNT(*)                       AS total_rides,
    ROUND(AVG(b.Fare), 2)         AS avg_fare,
    ROUND(SUM(b.Fare), 2)         AS total_revenue,
    ROUND(AVG(b.Distance), 2)     AS avg_distance
FROM booking b
JOIN taxi t   ON b.TaxiID = t.TaxiID
JOIN taxi_type tt ON t.TaxiTypeID = tt.TaxiTypeID
GROUP BY tt.TypeName
ORDER BY total_revenue DESC;

-- Dashboard config:
--   Chart type  : Bar (vertical)
--   X-axis      : taxi_type
--   Y-axis      : avg_fare  and/or  total_rides

datasets.name: 5aff4fa4
queryLines:
-- MAP: Pickup Hotspots by Location
SELECT
    p.PlaceName,
    p.Latitude,
    p.Longitude,
    COUNT(*)                       AS pickup_count,
    ROUND(AVG(b.Fare), 2)         AS avg_fare,
    ROUND(AVG(b.Distance), 2)     AS avg_distance
FROM booking b
JOIN place p ON b.PickupPlaceID = p.PlaceID
GROUP BY p.PlaceName, p.Latitude, p.Longitude
ORDER BY pickup_count DESC;

-- Dashboard config:
--   Chart type  : Map (Markers)
--   Latitude    : Latitude
--   Longitude   : Longitude
--   Label       : PlaceName
--   Size / Color: pickup_count

datasets.name: bbd08dec
queryLines:
-- PIE / DONUT CHART: Membership Category Distribution
SELECT
    CASE MemberCategory
      WHEN 'A' THEN 'Gold'
      WHEN 'B' THEN 'Silver'
      WHEN 'C' THEN 'Bronze'
      ELSE MemberCategory
    END                            AS membership_tier,
    COUNT(*)                       AS passenger_count,
    ROUND(COUNT(*) * 100.0
      / SUM(COUNT(*)) OVER(), 1)   AS percentage
FROM passengers
GROUP BY MemberCategory
ORDER BY passenger_count DESC;
-- Dashboard config:
--   Chart type  : Pie  (or Donut)
--   Label       : membership_tier
--   Value       : passenger_count

datasets.name: 1c81a73f
queryLines:
-- HISTOGRAM: Trip Distance Distribution (2 km bins)
SELECT
    FLOOR(Distance / 2) * 2       AS distance_bin_start,
    CONCAT(
      CAST(FLOOR(Distance / 2) * 2 AS INT), '-',
      CAST(FLOOR(Distance / 2) * 2 + 2 AS INT), ' km'
    )                              AS distance_range,
    COUNT(*)                       AS trip_count
FROM booking
WHERE Distance BETWEEN 0 AND 50
GROUP BY distance_bin_start, distance_range
ORDER BY distance_bin_start;

-- Dashboard config:
--   Chart type  : Bar  (contiguous bars = histogram)
--   X-axis      : distance_range
--   Y-axis      : trip_count
--   Tip: Remove bar gap to look like a histogram

datasets.name: bf193573
queryLines:
-- SCATTER PLOT: Distance vs Fare (sampled for performance)
SELECT
    b.Distance,
    b.Fare,
    tt.TypeName                    AS taxi_type
FROM booking b
JOIN taxi t   ON b.TaxiID = t.TaxiID
JOIN taxi_type tt ON t.TaxiTypeID = tt.TaxiTypeID
WHERE b.Distance > 0 AND b.Fare > 0
ORDER BY RAND()
LIMIT 5000;

-- Dashboard config:
--   Chart type  : Scatter
--   X-axis      : Distance
--   Y-axis      : Fare
--   Color / Group : taxi_type

datasets.name: faf0362b
queryLines:
-- BOX PLOT: Fare Distribution by Taxi Type
SELECT
    tt.TypeName                    AS taxi_type,
    b.Fare
FROM booking b
JOIN taxi t   ON b.TaxiID = t.TaxiID
JOIN taxi_type tt ON t.TaxiTypeID = tt.TaxiTypeID
WHERE b.Fare > 0
ORDER BY RAND()
LIMIT 20000;

-- Dashboard config:
--   Chart type  : Box Plot
--   X-axis (group) : taxi_type
--   Y-axis (value) : Fare
--   Databricks auto-computes median, Q1, Q3, whiskers

datasets.name: ff55287e
queryLines:
-- TREEMAP: Revenue by Taxi Type > Vehicle Model
SELECT
    tt.TypeName                    AS taxi_type,
    t.Model                        AS vehicle_model,
    COUNT(*)                       AS total_rides,
    ROUND(SUM(b.Fare), 2)         AS total_revenue,
    ROUND(AVG(b.Fare), 2)         AS avg_fare
FROM booking b
JOIN taxi t   ON b.TaxiID = t.TaxiID
JOIN taxi_type tt ON t.TaxiTypeID = tt.TaxiTypeID
GROUP BY tt.TypeName, t.Model
ORDER BY total_revenue DESC;
-- Dashboard config:
--   Chart type  : Treemap
--   Group 1 (parent) : taxi_type
--   Group 2 (child)  : vehicle_model
--   Size              : total_revenue
--   Color             : avg_fare
